class.name: ASEvent
class.description: [ASEvent] is a transient object used to broadcast signals between components. Unlike Tags, events carry data (instigator, magnitude, payload) and are intended for short-lived occurrences that triggers reactions (e.g., an Ability with [constant ASAbility.TRIGGER_ON_EVENT]).

members.member: Optional dictionary containing custom data for the event.
The Tag that identifies the type of event. Should be of type [constant AbilitySystem.TAG_TYPE_EVENT].
The Node that caused this event to occur.
A numerical value associated with the event (e.g., damage amount, impact force).
The engine time (in seconds) when this event was dispatched.
